Subscriptions are not auto-renewed. Please renew manually before expiry.

Free
₩0
  • Grid & Pixel modes

  • Grid & Pixel modes

My Files
dottypo
Design pixel fonts in your browser
01
Choose a cell shape
Pick square, circle, rounded, or diamond as your pixel building block
02
Customise your grid
Set pixel size, shape, and dial in effects like Fusion, Skew, and Gap
Fusion
Skew
Gap
03
Draw each glyph
Click cells to fill pixels, repeat for every character in your set
04
Preview live
Type any text to instantly see your font rendered in real time
Aa
Live Preview
05
Export your font
Download as SVG, PNG, or a full OTF / TTF font file
SVG
PNG
OTF
Help & Shortcuts
Getting Started
Pick a characterClick any glyph in the right panel
Draw / EraseLeft-click to fill, right-click to erase
Grid modeVector shapes with adjustable grid
Pixel modeBitmap pixels with effect sliders
Effects (Pixel mode)
FusionMerges nearby pixels into smooth blobs
SkewSlants the glyph horizontally
GapSpace between pixel cells
StaggerOffsets alternating rows
SmoothRounds pixel corners
Keyboard Shortcuts
Ctrl ZUndo
Ctrl YRedo
Ctrl SSave current file
← →Previous / Next character
+ −Zoom in / out
0Reset zoom
Export
SVGVector file of current glyph
PNGRaster image of current glyph
Font ↓Full OTF / TTF font for all designed glyphs
